summary: Iteration 66 - Page Builder Seeding & User Cleanup Testing. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend tests passed (100%). Page builder correctly seeds Landing (14 blocks), About (5 blocks), and Pricing (4 blocks) with actual Kalmori website content. User cleanup endpoint successfully removes non-admin users. All block operations (duplicate, delete, inline edit, style panel) work correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/seed-all-pages requires admin auth (401 without auth)
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/seed-defaults requires admin auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/{slug} requires admin auth
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/cleanup/non-admin requires admin auth
Backend: POST /api/admin/seed-all-pages seeds Landing (14), About (5), Pricing (4)
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/landing/seed-defaults seeds 14 blocks
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/about/seed-defaults seeds 5 blocks
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/pricing/seed-defaults seeds 4 blocks
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/invalid/seed-defaults returns 400
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/landing returns 14 blocks with G.O.A.T hero content
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/about returns 5 blocks with About Kalmori hero
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/pricing returns 4 blocks with Pricing hero
Backend: Landing page has correct Kalmori content (G.O.A.T, AI Release Strategy, etc.)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/cleanup/non-admin removes non-admin users
Backend: Only admin users remain after cleanup
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/add-block adds new block
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/pages/{slug}/blocks/{block_id} deletes block
Backend: PUT /api/admin/pages/{slug} saves page layout
Backend: Landing page has exactly 14 blocks
Backend: About page has exactly 5 blocks
Backend: Pricing page has exactly 4 blocks
Frontend: Page Builder loads at /admin/page-builder/landing
Frontend: Landing page shows 14 blocks with G.O.A.T hero
Frontend: Page switcher dropdown opens and shows Landing/About/Pricing options
Frontend: Navigation to About page works (5 blocks)
Frontend: Navigation to Pricing page works (4 blocks)
Frontend: Block toolbar shows duplicate, style, delete buttons on hover
Frontend: Block duplication works (14 -> 15 blocks)
Frontend: Block deletion works (15 -> 14 blocks)
Frontend: Inline editing works (text editable on click)
Frontend: Style panel opens with color pickers, padding, text align, custom CSS
Frontend: Save Draft button works (shows 'Layout saved!' toast)
critical_code_review_comments: Page builder seeding is well-implemented with correct block counts for each page
LANDING_SEED_BLOCKS, ABOUT_SEED_BLOCKS, PRICING_SEED_BLOCKS contain accurate Kalmori content
User cleanup endpoint properly deletes related data from all collections
Auto-seed logic in frontend fetchLayout() correctly triggers when page has 0 blocks
All admin endpoints properly require authentication
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin accounts and page builder seeding endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 tested page builder seeding and user cleanup. All pages (Landing, About, Pricing) are correctly seeded with Kalmori content. Landing has 14 blocks including G.O.A.T hero, features grid, pricing, testimonials, stats. About has 5 blocks (hero, values, mission, stats, CTA). Pricing has 4 blocks (hero, plans, features, CTA). User cleanup endpoint removes all non-admin users and their related data. Block operations (duplicate, delete, inline edit, style panel) all work correctly in the frontend.

seed_landing.content: G.O.A.T hero, logo bar, features grid, testimonials, pricing, CTA

seed_about.content: About Kalmori hero, values, mission, stats, CTA

seed_pricing.content: Pricing hero, distribution plans, features, CTA

user_cleanup.cleans: users, releases, tracks, stream_events, wallets, notifications, etc.

page_builder_frontend.style_panel: Working - colors, padding, text align, custom CSS
